Source Data / Parameters: Sliding window statistics for drift and noise, lab comparisons for bias, and data gap rates (loss) derived from qpudatashards.
Calibration Method: Using sensor calibration logs and residuals to define safe
column6: and hard bands for each component.

Description: Normalized 0–1 scores for each uncertainty mode.
Source Data / Parameters: r_drift, r_noise, r_bias, r_loss computed via piecewise affine corridor kernels.
Calibration Method: Mapping raw component values into 0–1 using component-specific corridor bands stored in ecosafety.corridors.v2.

Description: Relative importance of each uncertainty mode.
Calibration Method: Regressing downstream incidents and K/E/R degradations on component risks to determine weights that best predict failures.

Description: Thresholds for the composite uncertainty score.
Source Data / Parameters: Safe band (for example 0.00–0.10), gold band (0.10–0.30), and hard band (>0.30) for rsigma entries in ecosafety.corridors.v2.
Calibration Method: Aligning rsigma distributions with real-world failure modes and acceptable false-positive rates.

Source Data / Parameters: Computed from component risks and weights via the L2-norm rsigma formula, clamped to 0–1.
Calibration Method: Verified via CI replay jobs that inject synthetic uncertainty (drift
column7: loss) and check for expected increases in rsigma and Vt_full.
